title: Litensh Heavy Duty Slide Gate Latch Bolt Safety Door Lock with Padlock Hole, 304 Stainless Steel Barrel Gate Bolt Latch, 14mm Dia. 160 mm 6 inch
features: PREMIUM QUALITY : Latches are constructed from SUS 304 stainless steel, which is corrosion resistant. Thickened solid bolt, strong and durable. High quality stainless steel, elegant and beautiful Look, to ensure it will not rust and long service life.
TWO INSTALLATION WAYS : The door security lock can be installed on any side & direction: left, right, vertical or horizontal, suitable for two-sided installation.
EASY TO INSTALL : Padlock is not included. Supplied with screws, easy to install and maintain. Size: Solid bar: 14mm Dia., 160/230mm length; padlock hole dia:8mm. Please allow 1~2mm measure errow.
VARIETY APPLICATION : Door Latches are suitable for doors, boxes, chests, cabinets, windows, kennels, fences, bedrooms, bathrooms, shed, garages, toilets, bars etc.
EXTRA PROTECTION : The hole in the sliding bar is designed to place a padlock, can be locked which is more secure. Keep those pesty intruders away with this high quality door latch.
description: Product Description Litensh door bolt lock slide, heavy duty barrel bolt latch, slide gate latch bolt for wooden fence, shed door,yard door, barn door, shed basement , interior and outdoor latch - Material: 304 stainless steel with surface balvanisation - Bolt bolt diameter: 14 mm. Content: Bolt bolt with screws
